title: eragrostis appressa
intro: Eragrostis appressa is a species of grass native to Australia, also known as the flat grass or bent grass. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties lie in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis appressa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Eragrostis appressa is often made into a tea or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties.
